title: Meaco Cirro+® 14000 BTU Super Quiet Inverter Smart Portable Air Conditioner & Heater
description:
Energy-saving Cooling for Modern Living

Meet the new Meaco Cirro+® 14000 BTU Super Quiet Inverter Smart Portable Air Conditioner — intelligent cooling designed for modern UK homes. Combining advanced inverter technology, refined styling and exceptionally quiet performance, Cirro® delivers powerful cooling with greater comfort and efficiency during warmer months.

Designed by Meaco’s in-house team in the UK, Cirro® features a contemporary Warm Pebble finish, a large easy-to-read front display and smart app control, making it feel less like a traditional appliance and more like part of the room. Suitable for rooms between 25–35m² *, the Cirro+® 14000 BTU portable air conditioner is designed to deliver quieter, more efficient cooling across larger bedrooms, living rooms and home offices.

Super Quiet by Design

Portable air conditioners are often associated with high noise levels, especially when used in bedrooms or living spaces. Meaco Cirro® was designed to change that.

With Super Quiet mode operating at just 42dB, Cirro® runs at around half the perceived noise level of previous Meaco portable air conditioners, creating a calmer and more comfortable environment while still delivering powerful cooling performance. While decibels are measured logarithmically, the reduction in operational noise is designed to feel significantly quieter to the human ear.

This quieter performance is achieved through an advanced Dual-Wrapped Compressor design, using layers of cotton wool and silicone insulation to help absorb vibration and reduce sound without compromising cooling power. This makes Cirro® particularly well suited as a quiet portable air conditioner for bedrooms, home offices and other spaces where lower noise levels are important.

Whether you are working from home, relaxing in the evening or trying to sleep during a summer heatwave, Cirro® is designed to cool your space more quietly in the background.

Cooling That Adapts with Inverter Technology

The Meaco Cirro+® Super Quiet Inverter range delivers a smarter and more efficient approach to portable air conditioning.

Unlike traditional air conditioners that repeatedly switch on and off at full power, Cirro® Inverter technology adjusts its cooling output smoothly to maintain your chosen temperature using only the energy needed. This helps reduce running costs, minimise temperature fluctuations and keep operation quieter overall. Inverter air conditioners are designed to maintain a more consistent room temperature while using less energy than traditional fixed-speed systems.

A simple way to think about it is like cruise control in a car. Once you set your speed, the system automatically maintains it without constantly accelerating and braking. In the same way, Cirro® continuously adapts its performance to keep your room comfortably cool without repeatedly restarting at full power.

This smoother and more controlled way of cooling creates a more stable indoor environment throughout the day and night while supporting the exceptionally quiet experience Cirro® is designed for.

The result is cooling that feels effortless — powerful when needed, quiet in the background and more efficient every day.

Designed in the UK for UK Homes

Unlike traditional portable air conditioners that often prioritise function over form, Cirro® has been thoughtfully designed to complement modern interiors.

Created by Meaco’s in-house UK design team, Cirro® takes inspiration from the clean styling of the popular Arete® and Sefte® ranges, with a softer and more refined aesthetic that blends naturally into the home.

From its sleek silhouette and subtle detailing to the contemporary Warm Pebble colourway, every element has been carefully considered to feel more at home in bedrooms, living rooms and home offices. The large front display also allows you to clearly see both the current and target temperature from across the room, making everyday use simpler and more intuitive.

Your Comfort, On Your Schedule

With smart app control, voice compatibility through Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, and a built-in on/off timer, Cirro® makes it easy to create the perfect indoor climate around your routine.

Using the Meaco app, you can adjust temperatures, change modes and schedule cooling directly from your phone, wherever you are in the home. This is especially useful for everyday family life, allowing you to adjust the temperature in a child’s bedroom without needing to go into the room and risk disturbing their sleep.

You can also pre-cool your bedroom before you go upstairs or switch Cirro® on before you arrive home, so a cool and comfortable space is waiting for you after a warm day. The built-in timer function allows you to schedule both on and off times, helping you stay comfortable while using energy more efficiently. This is especially useful during UK heatwaves, allowing you to cool bedrooms before bedtime while keeping noise and energy usage lower overnight.

Four Functions. One Cirro®

More than just an air conditioner, Cirro® combines cooling, drying, heating and fan-only modes in one versatile unit to help you stay comfortable throughout changing seasons.

Cooling mode quickly reduces room temperature during hot weather, while the built-in drying mode helps remove excess moisture from the air during humid days, heavy rainfall and thunderstorms, helping rooms feel fresher and less sticky.

When active cooling is not needed, fan-only mode gently circulates air around the room for lighter everyday comfort.

Heating mode adds extra warmth when temperatures drop, making Cirro® a practical choice for year-round comfort. Ideal for cooler mornings, changing seasons or chilly evenings, Cirro® delivers more than just cooling air conditioning – it’s complete air treatment designed to keep your home feeling comfortable in every season.  

By combining four functions in one compact unit, Cirro® offers a flexible and practical approach to indoor climate control. It allows you to respond easily to changing temperatures and conditions throughout the year, all from a single, intelligently designed system.

Easy to Use Around the Home

Cirro® has been designed for everyday convenience. Integrated castors make it easy to move between rooms, while the intuitive controls and large front display keep everything simple and accessible.

For added comfort at night, the display can also be dimmed while using Super Quiet mode to help reduce light disturbance while sleeping.

Window Kit Options

Using a window kit helps prevent warm air from outside entering the room while the air conditioner is operating, improving cooling performance and helping the room reach temperature more efficiently. By keeping the cool air inside and exhausting warm air outdoors, Cirro® can cool your space more effectively during warmer weather. 

The Meaco Cirro® comes with two types of window kits included to help make installation simple and improve cooling efficiency throughout your home.

The standard window kit is designed for use with sash windows, while the flexible window kit can be used with all window types, giving you greater flexibility depending on the layout of your home.

Warranty

All Meaco Portable Air Conditioners come with a two-year parts and labour warranty, as well as the option to extend the warranty to a total of five years.

Returns

A return charge of £50 will be deducted from refunds on all non-faulty air conditioner returns within 14 days.
